title: TFC Better Blast Furnace
description: TerraFirmaCraft addon to compactly insulate your blast furnace.
body:
TFC Better Blast Furnace is a TerraFirmaCraft addon that adds a more compact way to insulate your Blast Furnace. Insulation is crafted using 3 Wrought Iron Sheets, and is applied directly to the Blast Furnace's chimney, transforming the Fire Bricks into Insulated Fire Bricks. This eliminates the awkward shape of sheets placed around the chimney.

![Side by side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30458ebaf937f16792da9f2af5992e8ebedbcfd7.png)

Traditional Blast Furnace vs. Better Blast Furnace

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca4d9800b13c40736775cbb44b79983c84bf2c8.png)

Easier to use in your building

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e8eee838b4e6f377ec48a892963c4de58c9c14.png)

Traditional blast furnace is an awkward shape, blocks cannot be placed near the chimney
